cadence.name: CampIn Blog Morning Publish-Ready Draft
cadence.purpose: Create one search-led practical guide for CampIn Journal.

cadence.name: CampIn Blog Evening Publish-Ready Draft
cadence.purpose: Create one comparison, seasonal, community, host, or viral-trend article.

quality_gate: No claim that public/forest/beach camping is legal without verification
public_publishing_note: Until campin.co.in hosting/CMS credentials are connected, automations create publish-ready drafts in the repo. Public auto-posting can be enabled after deployment workflow exists.
